name: 1shot1kill-dota2-mod
description: Dota 2 custom game alpha scaffold for One Shot One Kill.

scripts.build: npm run build:game && npm run build:panorama
scripts.watch:game: nodemon --watch src/vscripts --watch shared --ext ts --exec "npm run build:game"
scripts.watch:panorama: nodemon --watch src/panorama --watch shared --ext tsx,ts --exec "npm run build:panorama"
scripts.watch: npm run watch:game & npm run watch:panorama
